en: What else you got?
Well, next, I followed your bus driver.
ko: 음, 다음은 네 버스 기사를 따라갔어.

en: Newsflash, he really does have a broken neck.
ko: 뉴스 플래시, 그는 정말로 목이 부러졌어.

en: Fantastic.
That makes my life much easier. Keep it coming.
ko: 그 덕분에 내 일이 훨씬 쉬워졌어. 계속해.

en: Second-story guy out of Indianapolis,
Lasky, did a diamond Menard. Now, if you're looking for a talent
ko: 라스키가 다이아몬드 메나드를 했어. 만약 입을 다물고 있는 인재를 찾고 있다면,

en: who'll keep his mouth shut, you can trust him.
I say he's worth keeping an eye on.
ko: 나는 그를 주목할 가치가 있다고 말해.

en: Second-story guy, second-story guy.
Yeah, I got more second-story guys in my book
ko: 응, 내 목록에는 주니어 춤 파티의 여드름보다 더 많은 2층 집 강도가 있어.

en: than pimples at a junior prom.
That's...
What about, uh, that Heisenberg fella?
High school chemistry teacher.
You're shitting me, really?
Walter Hartwell White,
chemistry teacher over at J.P. Wynn,
working with a former student, current meth head,
one Jesse Pinkman.
Wow.
Uh, what else about the teacher?
He has lung cancer.
Jesus. That's why he...
